rulings.Case Title: MICAELA LEZCANO VS. ROBERTO RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 30, 2014 line 4. PLAINTIFF MICAELA LEZCANO'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendants shall provide verified responses without objections to From Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production by hand delivery or overnight mail within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Request for attorney's fees and costs granted in the amount of $850. =(501/RBU)
